summary: Retest of floating chatbot widget on landing page. Open button is now clickable (moved to bottom-24, no longer overlapped by Emergent badge). Chatbot window opens, input accepts text, send button triggers an assistant reply rendered inside the window (verified visually in screenshot).
passed: chatbot-open-btn is visible and clickable (no overlay interception by Emergent badge)
Typing in chatbot-input works (no focus issue)
chatbot-send-btn sends message; assistant reply from Claude is rendered inside chatbot-window (verified in screenshot showing welcome reply describing AI Agents and Growth Services)
action_items: Optional (not blocker): add data-testid like chatbot-message-user / chatbot-message-assistant on individual message bubbles to enable robust automated message assertions in future tests.
notes: Initial Playwright assertion polled for [data-testid^='chatbot-message-'] which does not exist in Chatbot.jsx; functional behavior is correct as confirmed by screenshot. Treating retest as PASS.
